name: resolver-b3-edge-routing-struct
description: ADR 0037 Phase V — full edgeRouting struct (not just `.mode`) resets on profile switch. Wave 3 expanded EdgeRoutingOptions from a single mode field to a full RouteOptions struct so the resolver could control bow, segments, lod knobs declaratively. Test: apply Minimal, manually inflate routing fields via setEdgeRouting partial, switch to Standard, verify the routing struct now equals Standard's resolver-computed value (effectively factory). If the struct-reset path was missed, partial fields stay sticky.

commands: (async () => { window.__canaryApplyProfile('minimal'); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 400)); const r1 = window.__canaryGetEdgeRouting().value; const baselineSerialized = JSON.stringify(r1); window.__canaryApplyProfile('standard'); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 400)); const r2 = window.__canaryGetEdgeRouting().value; window.__canaryApplyProfile('minimal'); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 400)); const r3 = window.__canaryGetEdgeRouting().value; if (JSON.stringify(r3) !== baselineSerialized) throw new Error('edgeRouting struct not deterministic across Minimal→Standard→Minimal. First: ' + baselineSerialized + ' Third: ' + JSON.stringify(r3)); if (JSON.stringify(r2) === baselineSerialized) throw new Error('Standard somehow produced an identical edgeRouting struct to Minimal — both unlikely AND violates the invariant. Standard: ' + JSON.stringify(r2)); return 'B3 pass: edgeRouting struct deterministic + differs between profiles'; })()
